name: cardano-ibc
description: This project can be use as a starting point for developing your Cosmos (Cosmos Hub) based SubQuery project

scripts.build: npx ts-node src/scripts/patchYaml.ts && subql codegen && subql build && npx ts-node src/scripts/patchEnv.ts
scripts.dev: npx ts-node src/scripts/patchYaml.ts && subql codegen && subql build && npx ts-node src/scripts/patchEnv.ts && docker compose pull && docker compose up --remove-orphans
scripts.ddev: npx ts-node src/scripts/patchYaml.ts && subql codegen && subql build && npx ts-node src/scripts/patchEnv.ts && docker compose up --remove-orphans
scripts.test: subql build && npx ts-node src/scripts/patchEnv.ts && subql-node-cosmos test
scripts.build:develop: NODE_ENV=develop npx ts-node src/scripts/patchYaml.ts && subql codegen && NODE_ENV=develop subql build && npx ts-node src/scripts/patchEnv.ts

author: SOSC
